title: MeshDisplacement
description: MeshDisplacement: Displacements and rotations at a discrete location in the Panel/FEMesh.

UXX.description: Translation in global X-direction. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

UYY.description: Translation in global Y-direction. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

UZZ.description: Translation in global Z-direction. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RXX.description: Rotation about global X-axis. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

RYY.description: Rotation about global Y-axis. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

RZZ.description: Rotation about global Z-axis. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

LayerPosition.description: Position within the element thickness that result is extracted from, normalised to 1. I.e. 0 = lower surface, 0.5 = middle, 1 = top surface.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
